creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #24)
I started creating a vuxml entry but I gave up. Gitea does not do advisories. Its just a list of links to ~30-40 bugs, and the bugs don't even describe the issue fixed in detail, so...

After abandoning the vuxml I forgot about the MFH.

I agree that one of us committers should commit the patch to 1.16.5 ASAP. So Dan you have my blessing, but I don't have any hat handy to approve this.
